name: Orchestrator
description: Multi-agent coordination demo agent. Declares the full 12-method set so DELEGATE, ESCALATE, SUSPEND, and PROPOSE can be exercised against it.
skills: delegates scoped tasks to sub-agents and tracks their completion
escalates ambiguous decisions to humans or higher-authority agents
suspends and resumes long-running sessions across reconnections
negotiates dynamic endpoint shapes via PROPOSE
fans out NOTIFY events to subscribed peers
